message:
feat(conformance): add Runtime Fundamentals Test Suite [asupersync-0zvn]

Implements RT-001 through RT-010 conformance tests for runtime behavior:
- RT-001: Basic spawn and join
- RT-002: Multiple concurrent tasks
- RT-003: Task cancellation via timeout
- RT-004: Join handle drop does not cancel
- RT-005: Timeout success
- RT-006: Timeout expiration
- RT-007: Race/select first wins (channel-based)
- RT-008: Nested task spawning
- RT-009: Panic handling in tasks
- RT-010: High concurrency stress test

Tests use existing RuntimeInterface primitives (spawn, timeout, channels).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
